name: Mikael's Blessing

active.name: Purify
active.effects: Remove all {{tip|crowd control}} debuffs (except {{tip|Airborne}}, {{tip|Blind}}, {{tip|Disarm}}, {{tip|Nearsight}}, and {{tip|Suppression}}) from yourself or the target allied champion and {{tip|heal}} the target for {{pp|100 to 250|type=target's level}}.

effects_structured.raw: Remove all crowd control debuffs from yourself or an allied champion, except Airborne, Blind, Disarm, Nearsight, and Suppression.
Heal the target for 100 to 250 based on target level.

simpleDescription: Activate to remove all disabling effects from an allied champion

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Purify is an active cast on self or one allied champion within 650 range, sharing one 120-second cooldown for both the cleanse and heal branches.
Player-visible behavior: the selected target is immediately cleansed of removable crowd-control debuffs and then healed for 100 to 250 based on the target's level.
Wave 129 (2026-02-25): Backfilled explicit fixed-cooldown active execution metadata (`cast_range`, `cast_windup_seconds`) for targeted Purify cleanse/heal branches.
